questions.stem: What is output by the code to the right?

choices.D: B C E I Q B C E I Q

questions.explanation: A Note that in either case of the character appearing first, or the integer appearing first, since int requires more space than char, Java will automatically cast the result to the larger datatype (int), which is why only integer values of the characters are printed. This can be circumvented by casting the result back to a char, but simply re-arranging the operators does nothing.

questions.stem: What is output by the code to the right?
questions.explanation: E It prints 02 on the first pass (i goes 0→1 and j goes 3→2) and 11 on the second (i goes 1→2 and j goes 2→1), then stops because i < j is false and never prints |, so the output is 0211.

questions.stem: What is the last number printed by the loop to the right?
questions.explanation: A x = x*/ 2 + 1 The values of x that would be printed are: 1 3 7 15 31 63 127 UIL Computer Science Written Test – 2023 District
questions.code:
for(int x = 1; x < 200; x = x * 2 + 1)
    out.println(x);

questions.stem: On which line of code to the right marked by comments should we place the following loop to center the output pyramid? for(int j = 4; j > i; j--) { out.print(" "); }
questions.explanation: A The spaces need to be printed before the star in order to center the higher levels of the pyramid with the bottom level.

questions.stem: What is output by the line marked //q09 in the code to the right?

choices.E: There is no output due to a runtime error.

questions.explanation: A Matrix Tracing.

questions.stem: What is output by the code to the right?
questions.explanation: E First, a % 3 + b = 7 % 3 + 2 = 1 + 2 = 3, so we enter at case 3. case 3: r becomes "X". Now the if: c++ is post-increment – c's current value 0 is used in the comparison, then c becomes 1. Since 0 > 0 is false, the && short-circuits and --a is never evaluated, so a stays 7. We take the else branch and r becomes "XZ". There is no break on case 3, so we fall through to case 2: r becomes "XZQ", then we hit the break. Finally, r + a + c is string concatenation: "XZQ" + 7 + 1 → "XZQ71".
